name: Amiga 500
description: Commodore's 16-bit home computer platform, known for arcade-quality graphics, strong audio, demoscene culture, and European computer gaming.

eras.title: Home Computer Breakthrough Era
eras.description: The Amiga 500 becomes a major European home computer for arcade-style games, music, graphics, and demoscene culture.

eras.title: Late OCS/ECS Gaming Era
eras.description: Mature Amiga game design with stronger action games, strategy titles, adventures, and sports games.
